turns.prompt: Automation displaces a fifth of the workforce in months. Productivity charts spike while queues at job centres stretch around the block.

choices.label: Launch a national retraining programme
choices.flavour: Reskill now, hope the new jobs exist.

delayed.headline: Retraining bills land as graduates hunt for roles

choices.reaction: Campuses fill with mid-career students. Employers wait to see if skills match demand.

choices.label: Tax automation and fund displaced workers
choices.reaction: Tech firms threaten to relocate. Workers' unions cautiously applaud.

choices.label: Cut red tape to attract AI investment
choices.flavour: Ride the wave, don't fight it.
choices.reaction: Venture capital arrives. Former factory towns watch from the sidelines — then the train leaves without them.

turns.prompt: New AI tools spread through offices and warehouses. Output per worker climbs. So does anxiety.

choices.label: Pilot a basic income for affected regions
choices.reaction: Direct deposits calm some households. Fiscal hawks sharpen their pens.

choices.label: Ban AI in essential public services
choices.reaction: Queues lengthen in clinics and courts. Staff feel protected — for now.

choices.label: Partner with leading tech firms on job creation
choices.reaction: Shiny innovation centres open. Critics ask who owns the upside — and who cleans the floors.

turns.prompt: Protests spread in industrial cities. Productivity gains are real — so is the human cost.

choices.label: Subsidise firms that hire humans over bots
choices.flavour: Pay employers to keep people on payroll.
choices.reaction: Some firms hire humans again. Others automate the compliance paperwork instead.

choices.label: Mandate minimum human staffing in key sectors
choices.reaction: Service costs rise. Workers feel seen again.

choices.label: Fast-track visas for AI specialists
choices.flavour: Import the skills you cannot grow fast enough.
choices.reaction: Labs fill with newcomers. Local graduates ask where they fit.

turns.prompt: The transformation outruns your plans. Every lever you pulled has a bill attached.

memory_callbacks.text: Firms you taxed on automation are now routing work through friendlier jurisdictions.
The investment boom you chased left whole regions behind.
Retraining centres graduate thousands into a market that still shrinks.

choices.label: Emergency wage fund for displaced workers
Break up dominant AI platforms
choices.reaction: Markets convulse. Smaller firms scramble for pieces.

choices.label: Declare national control over critical AI systems
choices.reaction: State engineers take the keys. Investors pull back.

turns.prompt: Final reckoning. What kind of work did you leave for the next generation?

choices.label: Put human livelihoods above efficiency
choices.reaction: Communities breathe easier. Growth forecasts soften.

choices.label: Bet everything on becoming an AI leader
choices.reaction: Exports of AI services rise. Inequality hardens — politely, on LinkedIn.

choices.label: Accept slower growth and protect the vulnerable
choices.reaction: Life feels predictable. Ambition dims quietly.
